items.title: Last year at this exact time, there was a ton of Derik Queen to the Pelicans noise.
items.author: Shamit Dua
items.body_excerpt:
Last year at this exact time, there was a ton of Derik Queen to the Pelicans noise. 

This year that noise is Nate Ament.
